programme.title: Around the World by Train with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor goes on rail journeys around the globe, jumping on and off trains to find adventure and face challenges, while exploring the history and culture of each place he visits.(n)

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris travels 1,500 miles in a journey from Cape Town in South Africa to the Victoria Falls in Zimbabwe, following a hugely ambitious railway pioneered by 19th-century British colonial politician Cecil Rhodes. He starts his trip in luxury on the Blue Train, a five-star hotel on rails that takes him to the mining town of Kimberley, where he explores the diamond mine where Rhodes made his fortune.(n)

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: An insight into the working life of officers patrolling the nation's roads, using modern technology and old-fashioned methods to bring criminals to justice.(n)

programme.title: Grand Theft Auto: UK
programme.desc: Documentary about people who make a living from crimes involving cars, revealing the tricks of the trade and examining the criminal hierarchies involved. Martin makes his money by keeping his eyes peeled for any desirable vehicles, before following the owners home in order to steal the keys, while Mikki uses an electric device to block the signal from the owner's key to the car preventing them from successfully locking it. Plus, a man who stage-manages car crashes to cash in on the resulting insurance claims, and a boss making a mint from his trade in cloned and stolen motors.(n)

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes at Hull Royal Infirmary to show the night-time challenges facing NHS staff working in the A&E department. In the first edition, a 34-year-old man is brought in after having punched his arm through a pub window. Handcuffed and accompanied by four police officers, his behaviour has medical staff fearing for the wellbeing of other patients. Matron Kat Henry deals with a flirtatious patient who has cut his head after a night out on the town and is determined to leave the hospital without treatment.(n)

programme.title: Bouncers
programme.desc: Documentary following the mobile security personnel who protect Britain's cities from lawless disorder, stepping into situations that were once the domain of the police. In the first edition, bouncers Marek and Greg jump into action when two men refuse to leave a nightclub. Further complicating matters, the men claim they have been assaulted by other doormen and call the police.(n)

programme.title: Punk Chef on the Road
programme.desc: Chef Scott Garthwaite travels around the UK to find top-quality produce.(n)

programme.title: Hell Below Zero (1954)
programme.desc: A thrill-seeking explorer joins a whaling ship and is persuaded by the female captain to investigate the disappearance of her father on an earlier expedition. The pair become suspicious of her former lover - and are proved right when he leaves them for dead in Antarctic waters. Action adventure, starring Alan Ladd, Joan Tetzel, Basil Sydney and Stanley Baker.(n)

programme.title: A Night to Remember (1958)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama recreating the sinking of the Titanic, told from the point of view of the ship's second officer as he struggles to get as many passengers and crew off the vessel before it sinks. Meanwhile, the captain of a nearby vessel embarks on a doomed rescue mission. Starring Kenneth More, Honor Blackman, Ronald Allen, Tucker McGuire and David McCallum.(n)

programme.title: Hondo (1953)
programme.desc: A hard-boiled cavalry scout with a feral dog as companion stumbles across a woman and her child stranded on their homestead deep inside hostile territory. Despite repeated attacks by the Apaches, they refuse to leave their home, leaving the scout with no choice but to stay and defend her. Western, starring John Wayne, Geraldine Page, Ward Bond and Michael Pate.(n)

programme.title: The Weaker Sex (1948)
programme.desc: A housewife regrets not doing more to help the war effort after the ship her son is serving on is damaged in the D-Day Landings. Drama, starring Ursula Jeans and Thora Hird.(n)

programme.title: Dante's Peak (1997)
programme.desc: A vulcanologist's suspicions that a long-dormant volcano is about to erupt turn out to be true, prompting him to race against time to save the community standing in its way - and clash with local government officials weighing his predictions against the loss in tourism revenue. Disaster movie, starring Pierce Brosnan, Linda Hamilton, Elizabeth Hoffman and Charles Hallahan.(n)

programme.title: Stargate (1994)
programme.desc: An Egyptologist and a soldier head an expedition through a mysterious portal to an alien planet. The world they find resembles ancient Egypt and is under the rule of a tyrant who has convinced the downtrodden inhabitants that he is a god - until the humans incite the enslaved populace to fight back. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kurt Russell, James Spader and Jaye Davidson.(n)

programme.title: The Great Beauty (2013)
programme.desc: A disillusioned writer leads a luxurious life in Rome's high society, but grows increasingly contemptuous of the shallow people who surround him. He wanders the city in search of inspiration, haunted by his own lost youth and past mistakes. Comedy drama, starring Toni Servillo and Carlo Verdone. In Italian, Japanese, Spanish and Chinese.(n)

programme.title: Little Men (2016)
programme.desc: A 13-year-old boy recovering from the death of his grandfather befriends the son of a Chilean woman, who rents a dress shop from his parents. When the rent on the shop is increased, it creates a bitter feud between the two families, and the boys respond by taking a vow of silence to pressure their parents into backing down. Drama, starring Greg Kinnear and Jennifer Ehle.(n)

programme.title: The Sound of Fury (1950)
programme.desc: A criminal recruits a hard-up family man as his accomplice in a kidnapping. But when they murder the hostage, they find themselves at the mercy of revenge-seeking mob, whose anger is stoked by the press stories of a crusading reporter determined the pair will pay the ultimate price for their crime. Depression-era drama, starring Frank Lovejoy, Lloyd Bridges, Kathleen Ryan and Richard Carlson.(n)

programme.title: Stalag 17 (1953)
programme.desc: The inmates of a German PoW camp are convinced there is a traitor in their midst when the guards seem to be forewarned of their escape attempts. An unassuming sergeant content to remain a captive until the end of the conflict becomes the focus of suspicion as mob mentality takes hold. Billy Wilder's Second World War drama, starring an Oscar-winning William Holden, with Don Taylor, Otto Preminger and Harvey Lembeck.(n)

programme.title: The Black Tent (1956)
programme.desc: A wounded British Army captain is saved by a tribe of nomads in the Libyan desert during the Second World War, and they take him to their camp, where he is cared for by the sheikh's daughter and falls in love with her. Romantic drama, with Anthony Steel, Anna-Maria Sandri, Donald Sinden, Andre Morell and Donald Pleasence.(n)

programme.title: Death Drums Along the River (1963)
programme.desc: A British inspector is called to Africa to investigate the murder of a fellow policeman and uncovers a diamond-smuggling operation seemingly connected to an upriver hospital. Mystery, based on Edgar Wallace's novel Sanders on the River, starring Richard Todd, Marianne Koch, Albert Lieven and Walter Rilla.(n)

programme.title: GI Joe: The Rise of Cobra (2009)
programme.desc: When a powerful experimental weapon is snatched by a mysterious terrorist organisation, two of the soldiers guarding it are recruited into a top-secret military strike force. As they go in search of the stolen technology, they uncover a plot by its creator to take over the world. Action adventure, with Channing Tatum, Sienna Miller and Christopher Eccleston.(n)

programme.title: American Made (2017)
programme.desc: A pilot is recruited to act as a courier for the CIA in the 1980s, carrying out covert deliveries from the US to General Noriega's regime in Panama. However, he exploits the opportunity to set up a profitable sideline trafficking drugs for a cartel. His dangerous double life takes a darker turn when he is ordered to supply weapons to far-right rebel groups operating in Nicaragua. Fact-based comedy drama, starring Tom Cruise and Domhnall Gleeson.(n)

programme.title: Alone in Berlin (2016)
programme.desc: After a Nazi Party-supporting German working-class couple lose their son during the Second World War, they decide to retaliate by secretly distributing handwritten cards in Berlin denouncing their government. Drama, starring Emma Thompson, Brendan Gleeson and Daniel Bruhl.(n)

programme.title: Devil's Knot (2013)
programme.desc: Three teenagers are accused of murdering children as part of a Satanic ritual. A private investigator hired to assist the court case begins to suspect they are the victims of a witch hunt, while the mother of one of the dead boys is torn between her suspicions over the lack of evidence and her need for closure. Fact-based crime drama, starring Reese Witherspoon and Colin Firth.(n)

programme.title: Esther Waters (1948)
programme.desc: A kitchen maid succumbs to the advances of a caddish stable lad and falls pregnant - but is abandoned for another woman. Period drama, starring Dirk Bogarde and Kathleen Ryan.(n)

programme.title: Appointment with Danger (1950)
programme.desc: A nun is targeted by two murderers when they realise she is the only witness to one of their killings, and it is up to postal inspector to protect her and bring the men to justice. Noir thriller, starring Phyllis Calvert, Alan Ladd and Paul Stewart.(n)

programme.title: The Man from Laramie (1955)
programme.desc: A cavalry officer determines to avenge the death of his brother, but rather than target the Apaches who killed him, he vows to go after the gang who supplied them with their weapons - leading to conflict with the sadistic son of an elderly rancher. Anthony Mann's Western, starring James Stewart, Arthur Kennedy, Donald Crisp and Cathy O'Donnell.(n)

programme.title: The Way to the Stars (1945)
programme.desc: A naive young pilot is assigned to a British bomber base during the Second World War, and is involved in the opening skirmishes of the Battle of Britain. He encounters the first wave of American recruits to the Allies, and falls for a local girl - but when his squadron leader is killed leaving a wife and child behind, he questions whether he can afford to marry. Drama, starring John Mills and Michael Redgrave.(n)

programme.title: Enough Said (2013)
programme.desc: A masseuse anxious about her daughter leaving home finds romance with a man also coming to terms with an empty nest. She later befriends a bitter divorced client, who turns out to be her new partner's ex-wife. Romantic comedy drama, with James Gandolfini, Julia Louis-Dreyfus, Catherine Keener and Toni Collette.(n)

programme.title: The Bank Job (2008)
programme.desc: A London car dealer is persuaded by an old flame to rob a bank. The heist goes off without a hitch, leaving the crooks in possession of cash and jewels worth millions - as well as a safety deposit box containing top-secret information the government and security services are determined to keep buried. Fact-based crime thriller, starring Jason Statham and Saffron Burrows.(n)

programme.title: Gemma Bovery (2014)
programme.desc: An Englishwoman goes to live in the French village that was the setting for Flaubert's novel Madame Bovary. As her marriage begins to fall apart, she begins to see parallels between herself and the book's heroine, and finds herself at a crossroads in her life when an old flame reappears. Comedy drama based on the graphic novel by Posy Simmonds, starring Gemma Arterton and Fabrice Luchini.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina receives an unexpected surprise on her birthday. Roxie has a special guest over for dinner. S06 Ep10.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina awaits an important message regarding a job at a local newspaper, but unfortunately her evil twin from the Other Realm has cluttered her inbox with junk e-mails. Cheers' George Wendt guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe is forced to quickly make a decision that could affect his and Mel's marriage after his new wife drops a bombshell at the ceremony. Meanwhile, Lennox is caught between Zander and Marco, and Ryder struggles to find the right time to make an announcement about college.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Still reeling from the unexpected news at the wedding, Joe issues an impulsive invitation without consulting Mel first, putting their new life together in jeopardy. Ryder takes an online course, and Zander tries to win back Lennox - but Marco has already decided to make a commitment to her. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben's rooftop beach gets shut down by Sondra, the president of the board of the apartment building, so he plans to overthrow her and do the job himself. Meanwhile, Bonnie and Riley go on a double date with Brad and his twin brother Tad.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben arranges to meet up with a woman whose phone he has found, however when he ends up running late the father has to send Tucker in his place. Meanwhile, Riley enlists Danny to help her take revenge on an old rival, and Bonnie creates a new business slogan. Comedy series, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his desire for closure when one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled on a cliffhanger ending. Raj discovers his new girlfriend Lucy has a blog in which she has written about him, and is upset when he learns she believes he has feminine qualities, causing him to worry about their relationship.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon discover their favourite childhood TV science show host Professor Proton can be booked for private parties and decide to hire him to entertain them. Meanwhile, Raj asks Howard and Bernadette to look after his dog for the weekend, but the couple panic when the canine goes missing. Guest starring Bob Newhart.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Erica forget to buy Beverly a Mother's Day gift and make last-minute 'Mom Coupons' instead. Understandably hurt, Beverly gets her revenge by cashing in every coupon they have made in one go. Adam yearns to go to a summer camp for junior astronauts and accuses his father of crushing his dreams when he isn't keen to give permission.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry's favourite shirt is hated by both his mother Beverly and his girlfriend Lainey, so they hatch a plan together to destroy it. However, once the shirt goes missing, Barry asks Adam and Erica to investigate. Murray decides to tear down the family tree house, leaving Adam distraught.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta is in danger of losing his flat but has no money to buy his own place, so Gina does her best to find him a new home. Holt and Jeffords organise self-evaluations for all the staff at the precinct, while Boyle helps Diaz to take revenge on one of the weekend squad officers who always makes a mess of her desk.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to set a new record on a training course, Diaz does not receive an invitation to Boyle's wedding, and Holt becomes addicted to a game application on his smartphone. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard isn't thrilled when he finds out Penny is considering taking a new job that has been offered to her by her former boyfriend Zack. Sheldon attempts to develop his brain further by learning new skills.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is offered a visiting research fellowship at Princeton University, and Raj makes some new living arrangements. When the guys complete their infinite persistence gyroscope project, events spin out of control.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe puts a ban on the use of all mobiles and computers over the weekend in the hope of improving communication within the family. However, he soon comes to regret his decision when he is offered a new job and needs to get back to his prospective employer in time to accept the post.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe is furious when he finds out that Dani had some older friends over to the house who drank his expensive bottle of wine, but wonders whether she is being totally honest with him about the event. When Lennox expresses admiration for her college professor Evita, Mel grows jealous of their relationship, until Evita asks to interview Mel for her latest research project. Shalita Grant guest stars alongside Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Now that she knows the truth about Margot, Riley decides to look for her biological father too, and uses her parents' high-school yearbook as a guide. With a little help from Ben, she narrows down the possible candidates to an easy-going pastry chef and a high-flying lawyer. Comedy, starring Chelsea Kane and Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley looks forward to meeting Philip's sister when she visits from England, but her excitement vanishes when it becomes clear his sibling is unimpressed with his taste in girlfriends. Meanwhile, Danny's contract negotiations with the Rangers are put in jeopardy. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta hits it off with Sophia, a woman he meets in a bar, only to find out she is the defence attorney representing a perpetrator he is trying to put behind bars. Diaz pressures Santiago to stand as a union rep, while Gina and Boyle try to move on from their relationship. Eva Longoria (best known as Desperate Housewives' Gaby) joins the cast.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct goes into lockdown on Thanksgiving when a mysterious powder-filled package is delivered to the building. Peralta, who has been left in charge while Holt and Jeffords are out of the office, is confident he can keep morale high and avoid any chaos - but things soon spiral out of control.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry makes fun of Adam for taking part in a school musical production, but when he finds out that Adam and Lainey have been cast in roles that require them to kiss, he tries to sabotage it by joining the stage crew. Meanwhile, substitute teacher Beverly causes chaos in Erica's class. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam creates a video that makes it look as though he and his friends beat Barry in a game of basketball, Barry demands a rematch in the school gym. Beverly tries to throw a 'surprise' party for Murray's 50th birthday, despite his objections to the idea.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Howard are furious when they learn that Sheldon went to work with the military behind their backs. Angered, the pair ask Kripke to help them get their own back on Sheldon, much to his annoyance. Meanwhile, Bernadette suspects that Ruchi might be trying to steal her job while she is on bed rest, so she asks Raj to investigate for her, putting him in a very awkward position. Dean Norris guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys find a laptop that has some virtual currency on it. The only snag is, the computer belongs to Penny's ex-boyfriend Zack. Meanwhile, a seven-year-old video reveals a secret about Leonard and Penny's relationship.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Detective Jake Peralta and his eclectic group of colleagues at Brooklyn's 99th Precinct are used to having a commanding officer who doesn't make them work too hard or follow the rules too closely. That all changes when tightly wound Captain Ray Holt takes over, determined to make the dysfunctional squad into the best in the borough. Pilot episode of the American comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom Billy plans a pig-themed wedding, complete with a world record pig parade, but his prim and proper bride Steph may not be pleased with his decision.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.sub-title: Celebrity SAS: Who Dares Wins for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Twelve famous faces undergo special forces training in the Chilean Andes with Ant Middleton for this special charity event, which begins with a backwards dive out of a helicopter. The first round of challenges include two-versus-one boxing, and one of the recruits is forced to confront their troubled past.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. First up is 30-year-old woman Emmy-Lou from Brighton, who has appeared on the show twice before, both times in the pod. Now she is back as the picker, unaware she is in for a big surprise. She is followed by 20-year-old Charlie from Oxford, a forensics student who hopes to find his ideal partner in crime.(n)

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Teenager Buffy Summers moves to the town of Sunnydale, where she hopes to put her destiny of single-handedly fighting the forces of darkness behind her - only to find her new home town is crawling with vampires. Supernatural drama, starring Sarah Michelle Gellar and Nicholas Brendon.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to confront his fear of driving when both Penny and Howard refuse to give him a lift to work. Desperate to be free of the obligation, Leonard and the gang intervene to discover why their friend never learnt to drive. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki, with Octavia Spencer.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is flattered when a graduate student takes a shine to him, but she thinks his social life is distracting him from his work and removes him from his limited circle of friends by forcing him to work on a troublesome scientific problem. Guest starring Riki Lindhome.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on what they watched in the last week of April 2016. The programme captures their instant reactions to Flowers, Fierce, Louis Theroux: Drinking to Oblivion, Horizon: How to Find Love Online, Caravanner of the Year and Antiques Roadshow. First shown in April 2016.(n)

These concerns are soon allayed though, as his inability to grasp bingo lingo takes precedence. Among others being paired up are retired factory worker Margaret and former bookmaker David - who has considered himself a long odds outsider at finding romance - and nursery worker Darcy, who is hoping to get a good reception from television aerial erector Aaron.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel gets a strange visit from her doctor, who drops by at Halloween to try to convince her that she was once a powerful teenage witch. At first she and Joe don't believe it, but then she accidentally turns Lennox into a cat, and Joe's Halloween robot Scary Larry comes to life. Return of the comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: As Mel and Joe prepare for their first Christmas together as a couple, competition heats up over whose ornament should take the prestigious top spot on the tree. To champion the worthiness of the ornamental star that has been owned by the Burkes for generations, Mel tells an elaborate tale from way back in her family's history.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley makes a bet with Ben that he cannot get a second date with Heather, but when she fails to jump at the chance to go out with him again, Ben resorts to desperate measures to win the wager. Bonnie meets a handsome stranger and considers ending her relationship with Brad. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau and Chelsea Kane.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Tucker acts like a lawyer in front of his father because he has forgotten to tell him he has dropped out of law school and works in TV. Meanwhile, Riley has a crush on a British guy, but Bonnie mistakenly thinks she has fallen for Danny. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys invite the girls to a Dungeons and Dragons night when their trip to Vegas falls through after an incident with airport security. However, following a few drinks, Sheldon and Amy's relationship takes an unexpected turn. Meanwhile, Raj goes on a date with Lucy, who tries to sneak out of the restaurant's bathroom window - but ends up getting stuck and calling for his help.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is offered an exciting job opportunity, but it will mean he has to leave the country for several months. Penny tries to support his ambitions, while Sheldon is jealous and attempts to discourage him from accepting the post. Meanwhile, Raja pushes the boundaries with Lucy, but puts their relationship in jeopardy.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam worries about being 'hazed' by the older students when he goes to high school, but he soon earns their respect by body-slamming Barry. Erica and her friends talk about what they are going to put into their school-time capsule.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam works on a new persona that he hopes will make him seem cool on his first day at high school. Beverly gets her teaching certificate and aims to work as a substitute teacher at her children's school, but things go awry and the kids end up in a Saturday detention. But after Murray pays a visit to the school, everyone learns an important lesson. Tim Meadows and Allie Grant guest star.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle asks Peralta to be his best man, but as well as helping out with cake-tasting and choosing invitations, he must also persuade the groom to start standing up to Vivian before the big day. Holt helps Diaz make a sincere apology and Jeffords, Santiago and Gina embark on a tough new diet - but struggle to stick to it.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta enlists Jeffords to help him tackle a cold case that everyone thinks is unsolvable. Meanwhile, Santiago plans a romantic weekend away with her new boyfriend Teddy, and Gina and Diaz tell Boyle one of their best-kept secrets. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang become concerned when Sheldon's former admirer, Dr Ramona Nowitzki, resurfaces while Amy is away working at Princeton University. Jim Parsons stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy must decide whether or not to marry Sheldon and gives him an answer to his proposal. Howard and Bernadette struggle with some unexpected news. With guest stars Laurie Metcalf, Riki Lindhome and Stephen Hawking.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel does her best to talk Lennox out of going to Colombia on a research expedition with her college professor, while Joe makes Dani call her mother to confess about her recent wine-drinking escapades. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Ryder announces that he plans to join the US Navy, but Mel and Joe are unconvinced that he is prepared for military life, and come up with a plan to make him change his mind. Their plot involves Joe pretending to support the youngster's decision by giving him a taste of what to expect during his training, but instead devising a fiendish mock boot camp intended to persuade him the life of a serviceman is not for him. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joe Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley gives Ben and Danny the time capsules they made at school, which causes everyone to reflect on what they have achieved in their lives so far. Meanwhile Bonnie is not happy when some unwanted attendees turn up at her dance class. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben is disappointed when he misses Emma's first steps so Bonnie, Tucker and Riley try to recreate the moment for him. However, the activity causes the group to contemplate how much their lives have changed since the child's arrival. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While attempting to catch a drug dealer, Peralta and Boyle reluctantly join forces with Agent Jack Danger, a pompous investigator at the US Postal Inspection Service. Meanwhile, the other officers try to help Santiago conquer her cravings and give up smoking.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to add a touch of romance to an event when he invites his girlfriend Sophia (Eva Longoria) to the precinct's work trip, along with Amy's boyfriend, Teddy (Kyle Bornheimer). Meanwhile, Charles is keen to help Holt with his anniversary breakfast, and Rosa refuses to admit to Terry and Gina that she is unwell. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly talks Erica into writing a Hanukkah song for the school holiday concert, inspiring Barry to prove his own musical prowess. Adam discovers that the things he loved as a child aren't always as good as he remembers. Ana Gasteyer (Suburgatory) guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly hopes to inspire the students when she takes over as substitute teacher in Barry's chemistry class. Adam accidentally embarrasses Emmy when he is forced to read out a note about her in class, so he enlists Erica's help to become a better friend. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy try to eliminate the stress from their wedding planning by applying mathematics to the process. Raj realises best friend Howard is actually hurting his confidence.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Howard plan respective birthday celebrations for Amy and Halley. A letter from his brother makes Leonard feel anxious about his own lack of accomplishments. The series takes a mid-season break until the new year.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake is assigned to a minor graffiti case by Captain Holt as punishment for turning up late for work, but the investigation becomes a major headache when the vandal's identity is revealed. Meanwhile, Gina's psychic friend Carlene visits the precinct to help with a case, and upsets Charles with a prediction about his romantic life. American comedy, starring Andy Samberg.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Desperate circumstances call for desperate measures as Peralta, Captain Holt, Santiago, Jeffords, Diaz and Boyle are forced to ally themselves with some old enemies.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members partner up for their next Halloween Heist - unaware they have to be handcuffed to each other. But that is just the start of their problems.(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon takes his new girlfriend on a double date but his principles are tested when she says she will kiss him only if he lets her redesign his wardrobe. Will considers the idea of spending time with a girl he finds embarrassing and boring. Comedy, starring Joe Thomas, Simon Bird and Hannah Tointon.(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon joins his girlfriend Tara on a visit to see her sister at university, so the other boys invite themselves along too. Will insists that he wants to look around his last-choice institution, Jay wants to be there to offer sex advice, and Neil's excuse for going is that he has nothing better to do. Comedy, starring Joe Thomas and Hannah Tointon.(n)

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: The girls have been up all night revising for a big exam - and all of them are convinced they are going to fail. So when an opportunity to get out of the test presents itself, they jump at the chance - especially as it involves spending time with Father Peter, who everyone fancies. Comedy, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson and Jamie-Lee O'Donnell.(n)

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: The Quinns play host to Katya, one of a group of Ukrainian children who have been sent from their homeland in the wake of the Chernobyl nuclear disaster. But while Erin is excited about sharing her wisdom with her house guest, Katya turns out to be a lot less grateful to be in Derry than expected. Meanwhile, the rest of the family has other preoccupations - a new development in Granda Joe's love life that leaves his daughters deeply unimpressed.(n)

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Willow and Xander come to terms with the existence of the supernatural, while Buffy sets out to rescue their friend Jesse. She soon has a more vital mission to carry out, as she must stop a vampire from performing a ritual massacre that will allow powerful undead overlord the Master to escape from his mystical prison underneath Sunnydale.(n)

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: The three friends find their lives heading in different directions after a sexual harassment suit is settled disappointingly. Jen decides she wants something new, while Roy ends up on the streets and Moss gets concussed. Comedy, starring Chris O'Dowd, Katherine Parkinson and Richard Ayoade.(n)

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Jen asserts herself as manager and makes powerful enemies in the shape of Moss and Roy. Meanwhile, Douglas finds the love of his life is not all she appears to be. Graham Linehan's comedy, starring Chris O'Dowd, Katherine Parkinson and Richard Ayoade.(n)

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Mum is in hospital having a 'woman's procedure', so Aunty Val is tasked with making the Friday night dinner. To Adam and Jonny's horror, she spends most of the evening glued to a dating app, before showing them several photos of semi-naked men. Val is especially obsessed with one guy, who goes by the name of Loverboy 309. The object of her lust is picking Val up from the house in 40 minutes. Thus begins an evening of hell for the Goodmans, as Val forces them to eat their lamb dinner in record time. Comedy, starring Paul Ritter, Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Tracy-Ann Oberman.(n)

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Adam and Jonny finally bring their 'females' home to meet their parents, and just to add to the potential confusion both girls are called Lucy. Before the objects of their affection can make it out of the car, the boys rush into the house to give Mum and Dad a last-minute rundown of the 'rules'. Though Mum seems delighted, Dad fails to make the best first impression. Nevertheless, the evening is saved from complete disaster thanks to some exciting revelations. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's TV breaks down, so she heads to the boys' flat to watch her favourite shows. However, Sheldon tires of her presence and bans future visits, leading to an embarrassing form of retaliation. Meanwhile, Howard and Raj search for the America's Next Top Model house.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard becomes convinced he has met his soulmate in the form of surgeon Stephanie Barnett, but he fails to realise she is far more interested in Leonard. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Raj argue about what to watch on TV. Sara Rue guest stars.(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Nicole is determined to avoid any association with singleton Bridget Jones. At first glance, Gary is no Mr Darcy, but the chartered surveyor assures her that this doesn't make him boring - while trying to determine how many bricks make up the restaurant. Bella - donned in a figure-hugging latex dress - seeks a like-minded chap willing to embrace the fetish world, and sets her hopes on Harrow boy Bertie. Meanwhile, fortysomething Jo is partnered with Richard Gere lookalike Gus, and Italian Paolo is paired with hotel receptionist Daniel.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Meanwhile, Raja pushes the boundaries with Lucy, but puts their relationship in jeopardy.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff grows jealous of Audrey's sexy home Pilates instructor and decides to fire him. Timmy and Russell fight for the attention of a good-looking waitress, and Jennifer is embarrassed when she learns about Adam's cheerleading past.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Audrey tries to forge a deeper connection with Brenda, who agreed to be her surrogate, by arranging for her and Jeff to go on a double date with the woman and her girlfriend Becky. However, a big secret threatens to ruin the evening. Russell regrets taking his latest date to a magic show, and Adam tries to demonstrate his DIY prowess. Guest starring magician Criss Angel.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina struggles to tell Josh how she feels about him, but finds herself strangely tongue-tied, and turns to Other Realm relationship guru Dr Love for advice. R'n'B artist Usher guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina defies her great-aunt Irma's plans for an arranged marriage to a man from the Other Realm - and the situation proves more complicated when the groom-to-be takes a shine to Roxie. Barbara Eden guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel is less than thrilled when her honeymoon to Tahiti is cancelled because she has broken her leg, so Joe surprises her with a romantic getaway to a lakeside cabin. However, things go awry and their dream holiday quickly becomes a nightmare. Lennox is unsure about whether to continue her new relationship with Marco and tries to keep it a secret. Comedy, with Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey

programme.title: Secret History
programme.sub-title: The Dambusters' Great Escape: Secret History
programme.desc: Dubbed 'The Beast' by Winston Churchill, Tirpitz was Nazi Germany's most powerful battleship. Protected by an elite squadron of fighters, it was seen as invincible, but after 34 failed attempts to sink it, the RAF sent in the 617 'Dambusters' Squadron and 9 Squadron. In a raid in November 1944 they managed to slip through enemy defences and destroy Tirpitz. With eyewitness accounts from surviving RAF crew, one of the Luftwaffe fighter pilots and German sailors, this documentary tells this extraordinary story and offers new evidence to explain the mission's improbable success.(n)

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures
programme.desc: How the German army prepared for the D-Day landings, despite having no evidence of exactly where in Europe the Allied forces planned to attack.(n)

programme.desc: Ben Macintyre uses the SAS archives to examine the history of the British Army special forces unit combining documents, unseen footage and interviews with its founding members to tell the remarkable story behind an extraordinary fighting force. programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Ruins from the time before the fall of the Berlin Wall, including a covert Communist base that hid Cold War submarines for Tito and the former HQ of the Soviet Army in East Germany.(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth

With David Stirling locked away in Hitler's most secure prison Colditz, the leadership of the SAS passed to Paddy Mayne, a man who built his reputation on the battlefield as a warrior of the first rank. In 1943, the SAS leaves the desert for Europe to enter a darker and far more complex theatre of war, where they face the threat of execution and the trauma of civilian casualties, as well as being the first to witness the nightmare of Bergen-Belsen concentration camp.(n)

While Fuzz Townshend puzzles over the Fiat's tiny engine, Tim Shaw goes into shock when the car's shell comes back from the acid dippers. programme.desc: The presenter undertakes a challenge to reenact the kind of parachute jumps undertaken by 23,000 Allied soldiers during D-Day. The first step is to restore one of the planes used in these missions, before undergoing training with the Red Devils parachute display team and the modern parachute regiment. Guy is then ready to make his a descent into the Normandy countryside. Featuring contributions from veterans including a flying nurse, a special forces pathfinder, and a German soldier.(n)

When she opened Cafe Hon in 1992 it was a roaring success, but as a result of Denise's unwavering business ambition, people started to boycott the restaurant, leaving her frustrated by falling sales.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas offers advice to Karen and Paul from Dundee, who are looking for a holiday home on Spain's stunning Mijas Costa where they can enjoy family getaways with their teenage son Nicholas. They would love to find an apartment with lots of outside space.(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: The Sunbeam Alpine, a sleek two-seater convertible, was one of the most stylish British sports cars of the 1960s, and is now back in fashion and much sought after. Former mechanic and motor racing enthusiast Ray bought his Sunbeam Alpine over 20 years ago as a retirement project. Ray was always an active cyclist and skier, but after he suffered a brain injury six years ago he was left with severe disabilities. Knowing how much the car means to him, Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend use all their motoring know-how and parts-blagging guile to get Ray's car back on the road.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Cathedral 73 in Cardiff, managed by Neil Chidzey. On arrival, guests are wowed by the glamorous rooms, but Raj is shocked to find breakfast is not included.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's the second day of the competition in Cardiff and Nick is planning to bring some refinement and fine dining to the week's proceedings. However, fastidious Nick really has set himself a mountain to climb with a massive tasting menu.(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples host dinner parties in Essex, with Penny and Chris, Lewis and Krystal, and Tatia and Mick all competing for the cash prize of £1,000.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Frank are pressured by their wives to join Robert in one of his therapy sessions - but the three of them decide to go to the racetrack instead.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra invites her divorced parents to Thanksgiving dinner, and Raymond sees something shocking that convinces him they are getting back together. The truth, however, proves far stranger. Robert Culp and Katherine Helmond guest star.(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne's mother infuriates Martin by meddling in his romantic affairs, while Frasier and Niles take part in a charity cycling event - even though neither of them knows how to ride a bike.(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin dispenses advice to a depressed Kenny, leaving Frasier feeling jealous, and a yoga class goes badly for Niles, who is taken aback to discover he is not as supple as Daphne. Guest starring Alan Cummings.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer revisits Steve and Sally, who wanted to relocate to the Warwickshire countryside. They had a long wish list for their ideal property, plus the added pressure of finding a home before the birth of their first child. Meanwhile, Kirstie Allsopp is in Northamptonshire catching up Rinku and Sunder, whose home was due for demolition, leaving them with a deadline to move out.(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A Warwickshire couple who run gites in France get married, rival bar owners in the Costa del Sol compete to open first, and a broken-down van could ruin a diving school in Menorca.(n)

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: A pride of lions at the Sibuya Game Reserve that once ate some poachers need to be moved - but the task of transporting them to their new home is far from safe.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business.(n)

programme.title: Two Sisters, One Body
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story of two Omphalopagus twins, a rare conjoined condition. About to leave high school Carmen and Lupita have more than their grades or their medical condition to think about, they are Mexicans in President Donald Trump's America. Now is a key turning point in their life as their American dream threatens to come to an end.(n)

programme.title: Hitched at Home: Our Lockdown Wedding
programme.desc: Across the UK, more than 60,000 couples have seen their wedding plans dashed by the Covid-19 pandemic. As lockdown keeps loved ones apart, Fred Sirieix from First Dates gives London couple Patrick and Louise a surprise chance to get hitched in an audacious virtual celebration, with their whole wedding party watching on. With only two weeks to pull it off, Fred works around the clock to make their day as perfect as possible, dipping into his book of contacts from the worlds of celebrity and hospitality.(n)

programme.title: A Very British Hotel Chain: Inside Best Western
programme.desc: Sales rep Mark has an ambitious plan to repurpose an old job centre as a hotel, while one of the chain's establishments in Edinburgh's city centre is assessed by a hotel inspector. CEO Rob gets his marketing team together to brainstorm a Christmas ad campaign, and employs a comedy gadget to pitch the results to the board of directors.(n)

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Liam Charles and Tom Allen host the second round of the culinary challenge featuring teams of professional pastry chefs from top hotels, restaurants and small businesses. This week, the five remaining pairs are challenged to create millefeuille that look exactly like eggs and a bird-themed montee which must be adorned with enough Paris-Brest to serve 24. Judges Benoit Blin and Cherish Finden are on hand to assess the results of their efforts and decide which team will be leaving the contest this week.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of musician Toby Leeming as he sets out to build a house wrapped around an ancient oak tree in rural Suffolk. The design for Toby's five-building home contains six bedrooms, six bathrooms, a music studio and an annexe - a vast project more like a village than a house. Creating this life changing vision on a £530k budget, and in only eight months, will not be an easy task, especially as they must build up close to an ancient oak without destroying any of the roots.(n)

programme.title: How to Go on Holiday This Summer
programme.desc: Steph McGovern investigates whether it is possible to get away safely this summer, answering some of the burning questions, whether travelling abroad or holidaying in the UK. From whether we should we book now and what the least risky way to travel is, to the trips we've already paid for and if we should cancel them and seek a refund or cross our fingers.(n)

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jade and Stuart kick off the competition from Essex with a fun and spontaneous menu, entertaining rivals Mark and Diane, and Chris and Rosella.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy's brother Peter turns to Ray for advice on talking to women, while Debra decides to help out by throwing a party and inviting all her single friends.(n)

programme.desc: The Crane brothers are delighted when their social standing grows thanks to a Russian caviar dealer, who offers them good quality roe at knock-down prices. Daphne tries to persuade a reluctant Martin to return $40 dispensed in error by a cash machine.(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink turns interior designer to help a local home-building scheme, but his plans prove too grand for the new residents, and he is soon shown the door. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer.(n)

programme.desc: A Menorcan diving school face difficulties when their boat breaks down, while in France, two gite owners receive a surprise glamorous booking.(n)

Stewart and Vic track down a debt of £5,000 from the owner of a computer repair shop in Lincolnshire.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.desc: Two families swap homes in this one-off social experiment, as they discover whether taking on another person's messy house can help them get to grips with their own grime. This dirt-busting documentary features two different, but equally domestically challenged, households. Both have let their homes go to rack and ruin - every dish is dirty, the carpets are thick with dust, and the bedsheets have not been changed for months.(n)

programme.title: Inside McDonald's: The 300 Billion Dollar Burger
programme.desc: The history of the fast food chain, examining its origins and its spread to become an international company, with outlets opening in Britain in the 1970s and even Russia embracing the franchise in 1990. The film also examines the controversies that beset the company in the 1990s, with scandals concerning unhealthy eating, advertising to children and animal welfare.(n)

programme.title: Secrets of the Mega Resort
programme.desc: Baha Mar has 11 swimming pools, 40 restaurants and bars, a 100,000 square-foot casino and its own squadron of trained sharks. Perched on a stretch of white-sand beach in the Bahamas, this enormous hotel complex can accommodate up to 7,000 people at once. Cameras take a closer look at one of the world's most luxurious resorts.(n)

programme.title: The Gypsies Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary following travellers' constant struggle to co-exist with settled communities. Carol and her family cannot understand why her community is so hated and vilified, while local man Arthur is on a mission to understand what brings the travellers into parks and public areas - and Carol's caravan is his first stop. Johnny and his family live in a chalet in Essex but his non-traveller wife Andrea has had enough of feeling ostracised and wants to move back into a normal house.(n)

programme.title: Busted in Bangkok
programme.desc: Documentary following Thailand's tourist police, focusing on four of the country's holiday hotspots as officers and volunteers ensure the good times do not get out of hand. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.sub-title: Can't Pay? My Nightmare Ex Wife
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents face a raft of excuses and stalling tactics as they try to recover £3,000 from a young debtor in Manchester, and a Kent businessman tries to protect his company from his ex-wife by claiming that it belongs to his sister. A Staffordshire optician who owes money to a supplier claims that the equipment he was sold was faulty, while enforcement agents in north London are forced to mediate between a tenant who claims she is being evicted for having children and a landlord who says she wanted to leave in the hope of getting a council house.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An episode combining new and unforgettable past cases. The High Court Enforcement Agents head to Manchester to track down over £5,000-worth of debt, and seize an expensive car in the process. Later in south London, the agents deal with a violent debtor who threatens them with a concealed weapon, and in Liverpool, they are met with lies and aggression from a mechanic who owes nearly £3,000.(n)

programme.title: Britain's Council House Millionaires
programme.desc: Documentary about some of the nation's wealthiest buy-to-let landlords, who have made a fortune by buying up former council homes, and renting them out to those in need. Among those featured is a Manchester property magnate who buys properties in the city's less desirable areas and rents them to students at up to £400 a month for a room, a London estate agent who only deals in former council properties, and a Kent man who grew up in a council house, and recognises the quality of the construction.(n)

programme.title: Inside
programme.sub-title: Inside Aldi: Britain's Biggest Budget Supermarket
programme.desc: Documentary looking at how the German supermarket has succeeded in the UK, overcoming industry hostility and old-fashioned snobbery to win the public over with its discounted goods. Former staff reveal how Aldi has overcome shoppers' suspicions using a host of clever techniques to cut costs, from multiple barcodes and less time spent at the tills, to their own-brand products - which are intended to look and taste like their big-name counterparts, but cost a fraction of the price.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours

programme.title: Home and Away

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Homeless
programme.desc: James, a 24-year-old self-made millionaire, who enjoys a lavish lifestyle of fast cars and luxurious holidays abroad, spends three nights on the streets of London.(n)

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: The story of the supermarket giant that rose high by taking prices low, battling publishers, petrol companies and big pharma to bring discount goods to the masses. Fashion guru George Davies reveals how his revolutionary brand George came to change how people buy clothes, while former CEO Archie Norman reveals why the American giant Walmart was so important to Asda's success.(n)

programme.title: The Gypsies Next Door
programme.desc: Travellers' constant struggle to live side by side with settled communities - from the point of view of both sides. Gypsy Bill has fallen out with his neighbours in Kent, so he organises a charity event to promote a more positive image of his people. Twenty-one-year-old traveller Georgia, settled with her own beauty business, realises she will need help from her family, and Warwickshire resident Jo sets out to find evidence of animal cruelty in traveller camps.(n)

programme.title: Busted in Bangkok
programme.desc: Thailand's tourist police are called to help a holidaymaker who has no idea where he is or what he's been doing, while two tourists have a run-in with a bar owner after they refuse to pay the bill after standing everyone in the establishment a drink.(n)

programme.title: Millionaire Age Gap Love

programme.title: The Sex Business
programme.sub-title: Me and My Sex Doll: The Sex Business
programme.desc: Return of the documentary looking at how people buy, sell and market sex, hearing from an array of individuals working within Britain's multimillion-pound industry. programme.title: Celebrity Sex Pod

The stars of Geordie Shore chat about multiple orgasms, Celebrity Big Brother's Andy West shares his concerns on HIV, and TOWIE's Jon Clarke considers masturbation. Plus, famous faces from Love Island, The X Factor and Ex On the Beach share their own sexual concerns.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Sex Pod
programme.desc: Model and reality star Chloe Khan and footballer Ashley Cain visit the pod together. Chloe is contemplating surgery to give herself a designer vagina, but Ashley's reaction makes it clear that this is the first he has heard of it. TOWIE duo Courtney Green and Chloe Meadows want to know how many sexual partners it is acceptable to have, while Union J's Jaymi Hensley plus Alex Bowen and Olivia Buckland from Love Island want to know why men seem to love their private parts more than women love theirs.(n)

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace wrestles with a newly wed dilemma - she only has two tickets for The Nutcracker on Christmas Eve, and cannot decide whether to take Will or Leo. Eric McCormack and Debra Messing star.(n)

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: My Wife and Kids

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Kent couple Rachel and Chris are pushed to the limit when their relationship with their tenant breaks down and she stops paying rent, leaving them more than £5,000 out of pocket. Now they need to get her out or they could lose the house. Elsewhere, a tenant uses scare tactics to keep his landlord off his back, and in Harrow, council housing officers investigate a residential property that has been turned into a brothel.(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A young mum locked out of her home by the young couple she allowed to stay there for free while the wife had a baby. Plus, an east London landlord who found half a dozen strangers living in his house, after his original tenant had run off and sublet the property. Meanwhile, Harrow Council raid a small two-bedroom flat in unsafe conditions.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Experienced enforcement agent Stewart and trainee Iain head to Blackpool to chase down a builder owing nearly £3,500 to an unhappy customer, while father and son Del and Dael are in Essex to collect over £2,500 owed to a frozen food company. In south London, Del and Brian attempt to recover nearly £10,000 from a debtor who acted as guarantor for a friend's rental agreement, ending in a bizarre stand-off with the debtor's daughter.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south London, Del and Dael Anglin receive a hostile reception from the brother of a debtor who has alreasy defaulted on a promise to pay £2,000 she owes to a storage company. In Worcestershire, Gareth and Craig try to recover £45,000 from a young online entrepreneur, who claims no responsibility for the debt he owes to his courier. Their target cooks up a flimsy lie in an effort to absolve himself, but dishonesty proves to be the least of the agents' worries when they discover a stash of guns at the back of the garage. In east London, an Indian restaurant owner begins to take his financial responsibilities seriously when Del and Dael start removing cookers and freezers from his premises, and a pair of pensioners in Oxfordshire hope the High Court will provide them a lifeline as they try to pay off a £4,000 bill to a solicitors' firm after a failed compensation claim.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.desc: After a woman is killed during an attempt to shoot her husband, the team discover the couple were attending an infertility clinic where the doctor was involved in illegal practices. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain.(n)

programme.title: The Bionic Vet
programme.sub-title: Give a Cat Two New Feet - Done!
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the work of 'bionic' vet Noel Fitzpatrick, who uses pioneering surgical techniques at his state-of-the-art centre in Surrey to save the lives of critically ill pets from around the country. In the first episode he tries to replace a cat's two paws after they were severed by a combine harvester, and tackles a Labrador's crippling arthritis.(n)

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Documentary exploring areas of the capital, beginning with Shooters Hill, Charlton, Greenwich and Blackheath.(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Twelve months with the staff and patients of one of Britain's leading cancer hospitals, the Royal Marsden in London. The film follows Rosemary, Phil and Ray as they undergo remarkable new treatments - including a multimillion-pound genetically targeted drug to fight skin cancer and advanced robotic surgery - and reveals the medical breakthroughs that are offering new hope in defeating a disease that more than one in three people will develop at some stage.(n)

programme.title: Sharp Families
programme.desc: For over a century men from the Dolomites emigrated to England to sharpen knives. Today their sons and grandsons dominate the profitable London knife grinding market.(n)

programme.title: Pirates of Somalia (2017)
programme.desc: In 2008, rookie journalist Jay Bahadur forms a plan to embed himself among the pirates of Somalia, and provides a rare profile of these men and the forces that drive them. Fact-based drama, starring Al Pacino and Evan Peters.(n)

programme.title: Kevcoin: The Movie (2018)
programme.desc: Wannabe music producer Kevin Powder hatches a scheme to get rich by creating his own cryptocurrency, with each token valued at a trillion dollars. But to make his plan a reality, he needs to hit the streets in search of investors. Spoof documentary, starring Jason Attar and Dominic Geraghty.(n)

programme.title: Bread (1971)
programme.desc: A group of friends camps out on what turns out to be private property, and gets coerced into redecorating the owner's house in return for being allowed to stay. The squatters plan to stage a music festival without the landowner finding out - and shoot a porn movie to raise the money. Drama, starring Anthony Nigel and Peter Marinker.(n)

programme.title: Heyday TV
programme.desc: A retrospective review of Bowie's classic album, featuring extensive interviews with Woody Woodmansey and the late Trevor Bolder.(n)

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Featuring Woolwich, Deptford and Lewisham. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay.(n)

programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life.(n)

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls take part in a fashion show, but soon discover that someone intends to sabotage the event.(n)

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: Kim is brainwashed into liking hip hop, and the other girls are forced to change their music to accommodate her new obsession.(n)

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The crew mistake an Irishman for a leprechaun, and help him to find his lost friend - who turns out to be a bear.(n)

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The King of Sweden accuses Halvar of stealing his jeweled sceptre. Vic must find a way to prove his father's innocence without making the king look stupid.(n)

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra suggests arranging a Present Day on the island, but struggles when he is asked to find a gift for Vicky.(n)

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The zebra realises that the island needs tidying up and organises a scavenger hunt to make everyone participate.(n)

programme.desc: Jack grows a giant beanstalk, and finds there is a hungry demon at the top of it.(n)

programme.title: The Importance of Being Earnest (2002)
programme.desc: Two bachelors using the same pseudonym capture the hearts of a couple of girls during a delightful weekend in the countryside. However, their cunning deception leads to all manner of hilarious confusion as the ladies in question attempt to work out who is who. Adaptation of Oscar Wilde's comedy, starring Rupert Everett, Colin Firth, Frances O'Connor, Reese Witherspoon, Judi Dench and Tom Wilkinson.(n)

programme.title: Girl in the Headlines (1963)
programme.desc: An inspector investigating the murder of a fashion model is led straight into the lair of an international drug-smuggling ring. Crime drama, starring Ian Hendry, Ronald Fraser, Jeremy Brett, Margaret Johnston and Natasha Perry.(n)

programme.title: Inside the Royal Wedding
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on preparations for Prince William and Kate Middleton's wedding at Westminster Abbey on April 29, 2011. The programme includes details of the bride's dress and the couple's honeymoon plans, as well as interviews with friends, old acquaintances from school and former royal staff.(n)

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney explores the injustices suffered by those who have unintentionally surrounded themselves with criminals.(n)

programme.title: Hot Property (2016)
programme.desc: A corporate spy loses her job after getting caught embezzling, and is no longer able to fund her lavish lifestyle. Faced with being evicted from her rented home, she puts all her skills of deception into fending off the landlord, replacement tenants and a psychotic estate agent. Comedy, starring MyAnna Buring and Tom Rhys Harries.(n)

programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught.(n)

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for the chance to compete for a cash prize. Presented by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman.(n)
